title: Improvement of ultraviolet C decontamination rate using composite quartz metamaterial
author: Tatiana Paslari
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
A new method for repackaging optical metamaterials formed from quartz spheres/fibers of various diameters is proposed for ultraviolet C disinfection of infected liquids by pathogens (viruses and bacteria). © 2022 The Author(s) 

 OCIS codes: 170.0170 - Medical optics and biotechnology; 120.3890 Medical optics instrumentation
steps_raw:

keywords: Pathogen; UVC Decontamination; Quartz metamaterial; Repacking procedure; Decontamination volume
